sources.name: UN DESA International Migrant Stock
sources.coverage: migrant stock by country and year

sources.name: WIPO IP Statistics Data Center
sources.notes: Future adapter for patent applications and PCT indicators.

sources.name: World Values Survey
sources.coverage: public opinion and cohesion survey data
sources.notes: Future adapter for national pride, trust, willingness to fight, immigration attitudes.

sources.name: ACLED

sources.name: UN Voting Data

sources.name: Wikipedia baseline
